headline: ₹500-1,500 Cr at risk (valuation and cost of capital sensitivity) — Adani Power's high ranking on Oxfam's carbon-emitting billionaires list raises ESG and reputational risks
what_matters: Possible P/E compression (5-10%) and margin erosion if transition costs rise.
BRSR [MANDATORY], CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Potential cost of capital uplift (20-40bps); risk of ESG fund outflows.
action: Monitor for fund outflows and regulatory signals; consider proactive disclosure to mitigate risk.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive climate disclosure and target-setting
